variants: Klara Hegedus is known for her impactful contributions in nonprofit management. She authored the innovative work titled Bronze Thistle Box, which explores new perspectives in the sector. The primary funding for her projects comes from the Heathen Reel Grants, which enables her to make a difference in the community.
